category_sources: Official GitHub repository describes updating Terraform/OpenTofu version constraints.
source_facts.description says it updates version constraints in Terraform configurations.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository title uses minamijoyo/tfupdate.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage and source_facts.repo both point to the official GitHub repository; README is the best official documentation surface found.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/minamijoyo/tfupdate, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub repository description includes Terraform/OpenTofu configurations.
source_facts.description names Terraform configuration version constraint updates.
